programmes.show_name: Asian Network's Shades On Mix with DJ Manara

programmes.show_name: Asian Network's Shades On Mix with DJ Manara

AJD brings a full hour of Punjabi fire from the UK and beyond including new Mickey Singh, Simiran Kaur Dhadli and Chinna as well as a few classics thrown in for good measure.
The pioneer of Punjabi R&B, Asian Network celebrates Jaz Dhami. BBC Asian Network honours a contemporary cultural legend.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Tanya Chaundhry joins Harleen Nottay to discuss her male and female perfume company Khane. The pair discuss the influence of her family and how she's built her brand over time.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: To mark Valentine's Day, Harleen Nottay speaks to expert matchmaker Naseem Mohammed about her company and to find out what you should look out for when undertaking online dating.

Haroon's dropping the week's biggest tunes along with plenty of laughter and chat. Wherever you're listening, Haroon's got the tunes to keep you company.
